failedAssertions.reason: Frontend CreateBenchmarkRequest sends field names 'scenarios'/'personas' but backend expects 'selected_scenarios'/'selected_personas'. All benchmark submissions from the UI fail with HTTP 422.
ReportPage does not implement a 'Back to Benchmark' link. BenchmarkPage correctly passes ?benchmark={id} in View Report links but ReportPage.tsx does not consume this query parameter.

blockedAssertions.blockedBy: regulatory-pdf milestone not yet implemented. Compliance PDF endpoint returns 404.

appliedUpdates.description: Added 'Benchmark Mode Test Data' section with pre-created benchmark ID, audit IDs, trust scores, and key URLs for benchmark testing.
